arts.ttl: PSG star leaves Man Utd and Arsenal with egg on face after Liverpool triumph
arts.sum: Desire Doue was exceptional from the bench in both legs as Paris Saint-Germain edged past Liverpool on penalties to reach the Champions League quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Man United could solve goalscoring issues by 'landing £25m bargain' during this summer's transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United could allegedly sign Juventus forward Dusan Vlahovic during this summer's transfer window for as little as £25m.

arts.ttl: “Getting some love” – Manchester United player set to benefit from break and affection
arts.sum: Rasmus Højlund has managed seven goals and an assist from 37 matches for Manchester United this season. This includes a brace in the Red Devils’ 2-1 win over Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League on December 12th. Since then, the striker has failed to score or register an assist for Manchester United from 20 matches. arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Bayern Munich, Real Madrid 'in competition' for Red Devils ace
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Real Madrid are reportedly interested in signing Manchester United defender Diogo Dalot during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Seb Coe admits Man Utd stadium 'challenges' as £2bn project compared to Olympics
arts.sum: Manchester United have announced their plan to build a new £2billion stadium which will be the centrepiece of a government regeneration project designed to transform the south of the city

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba confirms he is 'back' after Man Utd legend tipped Old Trafford return
arts.sum: Paul Pogba initially received a four-year ban from football after testing positive for a banned substance, before having it reduced to 18 months following an appeal - and the ex-Manchester United star can now return to football
